name: polymath
description: A public, open-source Claude Code marketplace of work-shaped plugins covering the full lifecycle of building software products.

agentSkills.notes: Polymath declares conformance with the agentskills.io v1.0 open standard for SKILL.md format. All skills under this marketplace use the SKILL.md shape: frontmatter (name + description ≤ 200 chars) + body procedure. Skills are portable across any harness that implements the standard.

plugins.name: polymath-connector-monitoring
plugins.description: Observability umbrella connector: Grafana dashboard snapshots + Honeycomb trace investigation + Elasticsearch log search.

plugins.name: polymath-core
plugins.description: Foundation: conventions, glossary, tone references, plugin-budget reporter, project-context loader, SessionStart hook.

plugins.name: polymath-infra-cloud
plugins.description: Cloud infrastructure design craft: pattern selection across AWS, GCP, Azure + Terraform stack composition.

plugins.name: polymath-product
plugins.description: Product craft: PRDs, acceptance criteria, epic decomposition with materialized templates.

plugins.name: polymath-engineering
plugins.description: Engineering craft: TDD feature-dev loop, code review, change verification, codebase orientation.

plugins.name: polymath-release
plugins.description: Release craft: Conventional Commits, PR descriptions, CHANGELOG, release notes.

plugins.name: polymath-flows
plugins.description: flows-lite workflow runner: deterministic serial executor with state, resume, and mustPass checks.

plugins.name: polymath-thinking
plugins.description: Thinking craft: brainstorm, 5-whys, pre-mortem, red-team.

plugins.name: polymath-planning
plugins.description: Planning craft: write-plan, work-breakdown, three-point estimate.

plugins.name: polymath-writing
plugins.description: Writing craft: ADR (Nygard), RFC, runbook, C4 architecture doc.

plugins.name: polymath-qa
plugins.description: Quality craft: test strategy, coverage-gap analysis, unit-test authoring.

plugins.name: polymath-security
plugins.description: Security craft: STRIDE threat modeling, OWASP Top 10 diff review.

plugins.name: polymath-frontend
plugins.description: Frontend craft: component contracts, Web Vitals budgets, bundle bloat hunts.

plugins.name: polymath-backend
plugins.description: Backend craft: REST API design, relational schema design, safe online migrations.

plugins.name: polymath-data
plugins.description: Data craft: SQL authoring, plan-based optimization, metrics-tree decomposition.

plugins.name: polymath-ai
plugins.description: AI craft: prompt engineering, RAG architecture, eval-plan design.

plugins.name: polymath-platform
plugins.description: Platform craft: DORA + SPACE devex metrics, golden-path design, service-catalog entries.

plugins.name: polymath-infra-postgres
plugins.description: Postgres craft: review-migration (per-statement lock + multi-step NOT NULL rollout) + audit-pg-config (memory, connections, WAL, autovacuum).

plugins.name: polymath-devops
plugins.description: DevOps craft: multi-stage Dockerfile, GitHub Actions pipelines, env-promotion.

plugins.name: polymath-infra-kubernetes
plugins.description: Kubernetes craft: manifest defaults, RBAC audit, Pod Security Standards; prod-kubectl confirm hook.

plugins.name: polymath-sre
plugins.description: SRE craft: SLO design, error-budget policy, chaos experiment design.

plugins.name: polymath-observability
plugins.description: Observability craft: logging strategy, OTel tracing, RED/USE metrics design.

plugins.name: polymath-incident
plugins.description: Incident craft: triage, blameless postmortem, comms-update; Postmortem/Comms-update templates.

plugins.name: polymath-connector-github
plugins.description: GitHub connector: MCP for PRs/issues + PR-URL detect + Stop unpushed-commits nudge.

plugins.name: polymath-connector-jira
plugins.description: Jira connector: MCP for issues + UserPromptSubmit ticket-key detection (PROJ-123 / browse URLs).

plugins.name: polymath-connector-pagerduty
plugins.description: PagerDuty connector: MCP for incidents/oncall + UserPromptSubmit incident-URL detection.

plugins.name: polymath-connector-datadog
plugins.description: Datadog connector: MCP for metrics/logs/dashboards + monitor authoring and incident-time querying skills.

plugins.name: polymath-connector-snyk
plugins.description: Snyk connector: MCP for vulnerability test/monitor + Stop hook warning on cached open criticals.

plugins.name: polymath-author
plugins.description: Author craft: scaffold new plugins/skills/connectors, validate against gates, measure listing budget, review skill quality.

plugins.name: polymath-decisions
plugins.description: Decision craft: DACI roles, weighted tradeoff matrix, Cynefin domain framing.

plugins.name: polymath-research
plugins.description: Research craft: Mom-Test interview guides, persona authoring, customer journey mapping.

plugins.name: polymath-design
plugins.description: Design craft: WCAG 2.2 a11y audit, UI critique, design-system conformance review.

plugins.name: polymath-communication
plugins.description: Communication craft: BLUF exec-brief, six-pager narrative, meeting-notes discipline.

plugins.name: polymath-leadership
plugins.description: Leadership craft: 1:1 prep, performance review authoring, OKR setting.

plugins.name: polymath-learning
plugins.description: Learning craft: tiered explanations, code walkthroughs, Feynman-style self-test.

plugins.name: polymath-performance
plugins.description: Performance craft: budget setting, backend tail-latency investigation, caching tradeoffs.

plugins.name: polymath-content
plugins.description: Customer-facing content craft: release notes, sunset notice, security/breaking-change advisory.

plugins.name: polymath-mobile
plugins.description: Mobile craft: mobile perf budgets, push notification design, deep-link routing.

plugins.name: polymath-connector-slack
plugins.description: Slack connector: MCP for channels/messages/threads + incident comms + async standup posting.

plugins.name: polymath-connector-sentry
plugins.description: Sentry connector: MCP for errors/events + UserPromptSubmit detect + triage-error skill.

plugins.name: polymath-connector-linear
plugins.description: Linear connector: MCP for issues/cycles + UserPromptSubmit detect + triage + file-bug-from-incident skills.

plugins.name: polymath-connector-statuspage
plugins.description: Statuspage connector: MCP for incident lifecycle + post-statuspage-update skill (severity→impact + customer-safe body).

plugins.name: polymath-connector-terraform
plugins.description: Terraform / OpenTofu connector: plan-review skill that flags destructive changes, drift, and unsafe diffs pre-apply.
